name: @pm/cost-calculator
description: The ADR-0001 §7 cost model as auditable arithmetic (issue #8): a measured resource profile (the bench receipt's cpuMs/bytes/requests, never estimated) × a dated, swappable rate card → $/1M visits at a required, explicit cache-hit ratio and region — the architecture-only view (one host's rates for every variant) and the real-world view (each variant on its actual host), plus free-tier fit and paid-plan charge at a stated monthly volume. Every line publishes its intermediate arithmetic and the rate's sourced quote. Dev/CI only — never shipped. Deliberately has no `test` script (@pm/origin-suite precedent): the arithmetic is asserted by suite/cost.test.ts and proven against a real receipt at the seam by suite/bench.browser.test.ts.
